name: OIDC RBAC
description: Advanced OIDC authentication with role-based library access control
overview: OpenID Connect SSO with granular role-to-library mapping, multi-provider support, and a full admin configuration UI.

versions.changelog: Fix admin role not being applied when role claims are split across the ID and access tokens (union roles from both); force EnableAllFolders for administrators; add RBAC diagnostic logging
Fix redirect_uri host detection behind reverse proxies (use Jellyfin's published URL); add optional per-provider ServerBaseUrl override
Update Jellyfin.Controller/Model to 10.11.10; fix ChangePassword call to use user ID
Fix Authentik discovery (relax endpoint validation); add Test Connection button on provider cards
